TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_José_Mário_Vaz, title = José_Mário_Vaz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/José_Mário_Vaz} }

S.FORM: José Mário Vaz ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 12, José Mário Vaz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Guinea-bissau ta' misuw hya' ga José Mário Vaz, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

José Mário Vaz ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 12, José Mário Vaz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Guinea-bissau ta' misuw hya' ga José Mário Vaz, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *os~ɕ* m*rio *az rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *os~ɕ* m*rio *az, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣuinea-βis~ɕs~ɕau taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *os~ɕ* m*rio *az, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
